locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

relations.subject: Peruvian antpitta
relations.evidence: It is found in Ecuador and Peru

relations.subject: Peruvian antpitta
relations.evidence: It is found in Ecuador and Peru

relations.subject: Peruvian antpitta
relations.evidence: "The only threat known to this species is the loss and degradation of its forested habitat for conversion to agriculture and cattle pasture, mining operations and logging." It is considered "rare and local" in Ecuador and "presumably secretive and rare" in Peru. "[I]t appears that this species is confined to mature forest, often close to riparian areas, and any activities which threaten such habitat within their range are likely threats."
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
